data.title: PumpFun deposits 84,358 SOL worth $9.3 million to Kraken
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnChain Lens monitoring, PumpFun deposited 84,358 SOLs worth $9.3 million to Kraken. In 2025, PumpFu sent a total of 1,722,955 SOLs worth $310.72 million to the exchange.

data.title: A16z Aims to Raise Record $20 Billion Fund
data.description: According to Foresight News, sources indicate that venture capital firm a16z is seeking to raise $20 billion for its largest fund to date. This ambitious fundraising effort underscores the firm's commitment to expanding its investment capabilities and influence in the market. The move comes as a16z continues to explore opportunities across various sectors, aiming to leverage its resources for significant growth and innovation. The success of this fundraising initiative could further solidify a16z's position as a leading player in the venture capital industry.

data.title: U.S. Senate holds first trade hearing since Trump announced tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer will face the U.S. Senate Finance Committee on Tuesday. He is the official responsible for implementing the global tariffs announced by Trump last week. This is the first time that a Trump administration official has testified in Congress since the tariffs were announced. Greer is expected to answer Republican and Democratic concerns about tariffs as lawmakers question the scope and duration of Trump's plan. More and more Republicans in Congress have expressed concerns about the impact of tariffs on the U.S. stock market and global trade with allies. At least seven Republican senators have signed a bill to prevent Trump from unilaterally imposing tariffs, however, senior Republican leaders said the Senate will not consider the legislation after Trump issued a veto threat on Monday. (Jin Shi)

data.title: U.S. Trade Representative to Address Senate on Global Tariffs
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer is set to testify before the Senate Finance Committee on Tuesday. Greer is responsible for implementing the global tariffs announced by U.S. President Donald Trump last week. This marks the first congressional testimony by a Trump administration official since the tariffs were declared.

Lawmakers are expected to question Greer about the scope and duration of Trump's tariff plan, as both Republican and Democratic members have expressed concerns. There is growing apprehension among Republicans in Congress regarding the tariffs' impact on the U.S. stock market and global trade relations with allies.

At least seven Republican senators have backed a bill to prevent Trump from imposing tariffs unilaterally. However, senior Republican leaders have indicated that the Senate will not consider the legislation following Trump's veto threat issued on Monday.

data.title: Anchorage Digital Expands Partnership with BlackRock for Digital Asset Custody
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Anchorage Digital has announced an expansion of its partnership with BlackRock to provide digital asset custody services. Anchorage Digital Bank N.A. has been designated as an additional custodian qualified to support BlackRock's spot cryptocurrency ETPs and other funds offering cryptocurrency investment opportunities. As of April 3, 2025, BlackRock is the world's largest issuer of spot cryptocurrency ETPs, managing assets worth $50 billion.

Currently, Anchorage Digital supports BlackRock's USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL). BlackRock can now access digital asset custody, staking, settlement, and on-chain governance services through Anchorage Digital Bank.

data.title: Anchorage becomes custodian of BlackRock’s crypto ETF and other digital asset funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett posted on the X platform that Anchorage has become the custodian of BlackRock's cryptocurrency ETF and other funds invested in digital assets. Through Anchorage, BlackRock can now obtain digital asset custody services, pledge services, settlement services, and on-chain governance solutions, which is a major strategic move for the company.

data.title: White House Economic Advisor Comments on Federal Reserve and Trade Policies
data.description: According to Odaily, White House Economic Advisor Kevin Hassett stated that the Federal Reserve will determine its policy direction regarding interest rates. U.S. President Donald Trump aims to achieve fair and reciprocal trade and will consider this when deciding whether to accept proposals from other countries.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Significant Gains Following Black Monday Prank
data.description: According to Odaily, David Sacks, the White House's head of cryptocurrency and AI, announced on the X platform that the 'Black Monday prank' has concluded. The U.S. stock market has continued its upward trend, with the Nasdaq increasing by 4%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 3.6%, and the S&P 500 climbing by 3.7%.
